violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Ice scoops: store so handles are not in contact with ice.--Wiping cloth solution concentration was >200 ppm chlorine. ** corrected during review

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Blue Lowes bucket is not a food grade container. > Use a clear liner or replace with a bucket that has contained food such as pickles.
